title: SBI – Concurrent Auditor – 821 Posts
shortInfo: The State Bank of India (SBI) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 821 Concurrent Auditor. Candidates with Retired Staff Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 14-05-2026, and closes on 11-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SBI website, sbi.bank.in/.

basic_details.job_title: SBI Concurrent Auditor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 821 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The State Bank of India (SBI) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 821 Concurrent Auditor. Candidates with Retired Staff Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 14-05-2026, and closes on 11-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SBI website, sbi.bank.in/.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the SBI Careers website https://www.sbi.bank.in/web/careers/current-openings. Candidates will be required to register themselves online through the link available on SBI website. After registering online, candidates are advised to take a printout of the system generated online application form. Candidates should first scan their latest photograph and signature and upload them as per prescribed guidelines. The online application will be active from 14-05-2026 to 11-06-2026.
seo_tags: State Bank of India Concurrent Auditor Recruitment 2026
